nav.fundPayrollBatches: Lo akọọlẹ yii lati inawo awọn sisan owo pipọ.

dashboard.title: Akopọ Iṣẹ
dashboard.description: Wo iṣakoso owo osise rẹ ni ilẹ Afrika. Inawo ile-ọba rẹ ni aaya, fọwọsi awọn sisan ti nduro, ki o si ṣayẹwo awọn sisan tuntun lori blockchain.
dashboard.accountNotFound: A ko ri akọọlẹ lori testnet
dashboard.updatedSecondsAgo: Ti ṣe imudojuiwọn ni {seconds, plural, =0 {0 aaya} one {# aaya} other {# aaya}} sẹyin
dashboard.connectToLoad: So wallet lati gba awọn iye gidi.
dashboard.networkFees: Awọn owo-ọya nẹtiwọọki ati iṣẹ akọọlẹ
dashboard.heroTitle: Mu gbogbo ọna sisan han, inawo, ati igbẹkẹle.
dashboard.heroDescription: Dasibodu AfriWage tuntun da lori iṣẹ oniṣakoso gidi: inawo ile-ọba, ṣayẹwo awọn osise, fi owo sisan ranṣẹ, ki o si jẹri gbigba.

send.title: Fi Owo ranṣẹ
send.description: Fi USDC ranṣẹ lẹsẹkẹsẹ si eyikeyi adirẹsi Stellar lori testnet.
send.memoTooLong: Akọsilẹ gbọdọ kere ju ẹyọ 28 lọ
send.connectBeforeSend: Jọwọ so wallet rẹ ṣaaju fifiranṣẹ owo.
send.paymentFailed: Sisan kuna. Jọwọ ṣayẹwo iye rẹ ki o tun gbiyanju.

wallet.title: Apamọwọ
wallet.description: Ṣakoso apamọwọ Stellar rẹ ki o wo awọn iye.
wallet.connectFreighter: So Freighter lati wo awọn iye XLM ati USDC gidi rẹ.
wallet.failedBalances: Kuna lati gba awọn iye. Akọọlẹ le ma wa lori testnet.
wallet.fundedSuccess: Akọọlẹ ti ni inawo! Awọn iye yoo tun ṣe atunṣe laipẹ.

transactions.title: Awọn Iṣowo
transactions.description: Wo itan sisan Stellar rẹ ati iṣẹ.
transactions.connectToView: So wallet rẹ lati wo awọn iṣowo
transactions.connectFreighter: So Freighter lati wo itan sisan rẹ.

settings.title: Eto
settings.description: Ṣakoso profaili ile-iṣẹ rẹ, ṣeto iṣọda meji, ki o si ṣeto awọn ọna sisan aiyipada rẹ.

walletConnect.installFreighter: Fi igbimọ aṣawakiri Freighter sori ẹrọ lati so apamọwọ Stellar rẹ.

batch.title: Awọn Owo Pipọ
batch.description: Gbe CSV sori ẹrọ lati san awọn osise pupọ ni igba kan.
batch.uploadHint: Fa ki o ju CSV sori ẹrọ nibi, tabi tẹ lati wa
batch.csvOnly: Awọn faili .csv nikan ni a gba
batch.confirmSendAll: Jẹri ki o Fi Gbogbo ranṣẹ
batch.invalidFile: Jọwọ gbe faili .csv to tọ sori ẹrọ
batch.noValidRows: Ko si awọn ila sisan to tọ
batch.invalidAmount: Iye gbọdọ jẹ nọmba to dara
batch.connectWallet: So wallet rẹ lati fi awọn owo pipọ ranṣẹ
